Notes: Test whether identical duplicate members inside an rrset_equals prerequisite are canonicalized as a redundant exact set or rejected as malformed/ambiguous.

Steps.Description: Prerequisite repeats the same A RR twice for helper.campus.edu. as an rrset_equals exact-match check; if accepted, add a harmless RR elsewhere in-zone.

Steps.Name: marker.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the harmless add was applied.
